name: John Price
description:
⚘ | he had no clue you’ve been trying to court him all this time, a little push from Kyle is all he needs to stand outside your door with a basket full of goodies, hoping you want him as much as he wants you.

⚘ 「 tags: omegaverse, alpha!char, omega!user, fluffy, call of duty, unestablished relationship, courting  」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: should have none, he’s supposed to be a lil fluff ball 」⚘

Implied small age gap (don’t be weird)

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

I’m having a bad flare up with my lil autoimmune disease and it’s stressing me out, which is making the flare up worse. (Someone sedate me)

token heavy, womp womp (sorry)

If you love omegaverse as much as I do (or COD men in general) consider checking out one of my favorite bot creators, Spider. (Seriously, he has so many yummy bots and is HIGHLY underrated in my opinion)

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. changing the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘

❁ Interested in making an omegaverse bot using my lore? Go ahead! Let me know when you post the bot! I want to check it out. A little credit for the lore is all I ask. You can find my lore here.

⚘

❁ Let’s THINK before we post a review, please. I won’t hesitate to block you if you’re rude or disrespectful towards me or anyone in my review section. If you’re a minor, and you tell me in the review section, you’ll be blocked and reported.

It’s not hard to be a decent human being.

⚘

❁ If you’re wondering why you’ve been blocked:

You’re a minor, on an 18+ site and you decide to announce it- or if I just suspect that you’re a minor, you’ll be blocked.

You said something disrespectful to me or another person in my review section, you’ll be blocked.

⚘

❁ If you’re wondering why your comment has been deleted:

You left a review about the violence, gore and whatever else when I asked you not to.

You left a review about the jllm bugs, that I have no control over. (Ie. talking for you, wrong pronouns, repeating what you said)

You comment something that makes me uncomfortable.
creator: Nicoolee
